subsystems.name: arc engine core
subsystems.why: Lifecycle determinism, bounded transitions, and truth-plane protections are covered by dedicated verification and passed in certification matrix.
subsystems.residualRisk: Threshold tuning may need future iteration when broader narrative datasets increase.

subsystems.name: chapter / movement progression
subsystems.why: Progression legitimacy and readiness behavior are explicitly tested and now reachable through standardized verification alias and storyline umbrella.
subsystems.residualRisk: Edge-case blocker semantics could require refinement under larger chapter variance.

subsystems.name: narrative pressure engine
subsystems.why: Bounded pressure outputs, blocked/reinforced behavior, and non-override constraints are covered and green.
subsystems.residualRisk: Category balancing may need calibration to avoid over/under-emphasis across novel narrative contexts.

subsystems.name: branch governance engine
subsystems.why: Depth/sibling limits, legality, risk, and reconvergence logic have deterministic tests and passed strict verification flow.
subsystems.residualRisk: Complex branch topologies may expose additional warning-tuning needs.

subsystems.name: storyline orchestrator
subsystems.why: Compact bundle assembly and mode restrictions are covered and included in aggregate storyline verification.
subsystems.residualRisk: Future additional input sources could increase merge-surface complexity.

subsystems.name: scene / interaction storyline wiring
subsystems.why: Bounded consumption seams are tested and included in umbrella verification without forcing behavior.
subsystems.residualRisk: Prompt-level weighting effects can drift subtly over time even when structural tests remain green.

subsystems.name: storyline explainability surface
subsystems.why: Author/debug explainability payloads are bounded, contract-governed, and tested for reader-surface separation.
subsystems.residualRisk: Explainability reason-code quality may require iterative refinement for operator ergonomics.

subsystems.name: storyline verification surface
subsystems.why: Chunk 8 centralized proof coverage via verify:storyline and integrated it into strict full-system verification flow.
subsystems.residualRisk: Coverage breadth still depends on continued maintenance of underlying subsystem tests.

subsystems.name: truth-boundary safety across storyline paths
subsystems.why: Interaction truth firewall checks remain strict and green in standalone and strict system runs.
subsystems.residualRisk: New future storyline pathways must preserve explicit boundary assertions.

subsystems.name: contract governance for storyline payloads
subsystems.why: Contract registry, strict payload schemas, and drift checks passed with storyline additions included.
subsystems.residualRisk: Schema growth may increase maintenance overhead if ownership boundaries are unclear.
